channel.title: Comments for page "The Sound of Beeps"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "The Sound of Beeps"

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
This remains me my grandma when she passes away and I was eight standing beside her bed play on my mothers phone and never said a good bye

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
this is a sad story
but a good one
a sad +1 for this one

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
From my original forum post a few weeks prior re: this idea —
"I stood next to a beeping IV machine today, silencing it every 60 seconds or so. It was my job to keep this machine as quiet as possible while my team told a man and his family that he had a few days at most to live, and that we were out of options for his treatment. It's been a weird day, so here's a tale that's basically me processing all this out in the open. Reviews welcome."

Many thanks to Zyn, to MrMistopheles, to MewI-tiverse, DrMorris, BlueJones, and anyone else I've forgotten who looked at this in chat! And shout-out to CadaverCommander for his creation of SCP-4999!
